artPrompt: A looming goblin soldier filling the wide frame, leaning in with a crooked sneer, one hand resting heavy on a sketched pretzel cart, amber lamplight catching his teeth while his bulk bleeds into ink shadow below. Cigar smoke curls from the corner of his mouth into smoky brown. All menacing lean and implied threat. Intimate criminal menace, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Protection Racket Goon
text:
Menace
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may have target opponent gain 1 life. If you do, you create a Favor token. Be a shame if that life went missing.
flavorText: "Nice little life total you got there. Real healthy. Real fragile."
